notes: Combined data cleanup following v4.3.178: normalizes charcoal-burners / mild flexible-gill russulas from an under-sourced food record to ID/caution source-review framing.
Keeps major legitimate edible mushrooms edible while adding source-hygiene notes where current links primarily support ID/comparison rather than edible-use clearance.
Clarifies Dryad’s saddle NPS source note as support for field recognition and edible-when-very-young / older-shelves-too-tough framing.
Removes weak-rights visible images from indecisus-bolete while leaving its route policy unchanged as avoid/review_required pending a mild-Tylopilus supervisor decision.
